description.unified: Restores HP of the 4 allies with the lowest HP by 10% of Max HP, and additionally restores HP every 1sec for [8 sec->10sec]. This effect cannot be dispelled.
Removes all negative effects from all allies and increases their M.DEF by {0} for [20 sec->15sec].
Deals Magic DMG to enemies within range 10 time, and reduces their ATK Spd by [25%->10%] for [???->10sec].
Every [7sec->8sec], restores [1 orb->1000] Mana and HP to [the->1] ally with the lowest HP.

IV.unified: Increases Mana Recovery per sec of the target by [50%->15%].
Increases CC Resist by [250->120] for [20 sec->15 sec].

light.unified: Mana cost is increased by [1->1000], and the effect now applies to all allies.
Increases the target’s Magic DMG taken by 10%.

dark.unified: Increases the target’s Physical DMG taken by 10%.
Additionally restores [1 orb->500] Mana to the [ally->2 allies] with the highest Attack.

description.unified: [Soulrush] Reduces Mana Cost by 1 and heals all allies' HP by {0}% of DMG.

dark.unified: All allies’ Mana recovery per second increases by 30%, and your cooldown of all skills is reduced by 5%.

description.unified: Every 20 sec, puts the 2 allies with the lowest HP into Spirit Form for {0} sec. Allies in Spirit Form are immune to physical attacks, their HP cannot be reduced below 1%, and their [MP Recovery per sec->Mana recovery per second] increases by [{1}%->35%].

Summons the soul of God’s Lamp, Kurulati for 10sec, increasing all allies’ ATK SPD by [300->{2}] and [Mana Recovery per sec by 100%->Mana Recovery by 15%]. Afterward, every 3sec, inflicts Hallucination on a random enemy, reducing ACC by 350 for 3sec.

2.from: Upon activation, immediately activates the invisibility effect of God's Lamp, Kurulati on 2 allies.
2.to: Upon activation, immediately activates the invisibility effect of God's Lamp, Kurulati on {1} allies.
2.unified: Upon activation, immediately activates the invisibility effect of God's Lamp, Kurulati on [{1}->{1}] allies.
